items.title: US Strikes on Iran — 49 Tomahawk + Fighter Jets; Trump in Situation Room with Vance, Kushner, Witkoff; targets: ammo depots, C2 nodes, radar, air defense in southwest Iran; closest target ~40 miles from Tehran
Hegseth 'Negotiate with Bombs' — Pentagon escalation rhetoric; 'If we need to negotiate with bombs, we'll negotiate with bombs. And we're very good at it.'

Iran Retaliatory Strikes on US Bases — Al-Harir (Iraq), Ali Al-Salem (Kuwait), Al-Azraq/Muwaffaq Salti (Jordan), US 5th Fleet (Bahrain), US vessels in Hormuz; IRGC claims 21 attacks; Jordan intercepted 5 missiles
US Embassy Ordered Departure — Baghdad (ordered), Bahrain/Kuwait (voluntary); Pentagon authorized dependents departure across Middle East; Trump: 'less confident' about nuclear deal
Trump Ultimatum via Qatar — 'bomb the S out of them tomorrow night'; strikes were response to Apache; IRGC denied contact with US
IRGC Claims Complete Hormuz Closure — CENTCOM denies: 'Commercial ships are continuing to transit'; information war over strait status
Houthi Escalation Threat — 'complete and total ban on Israeli maritime navigation in Red Sea'; threatens to close Bab el-Mandeb; both global chokepoints now threatened
M/T Settebello Tanker Attack — CENTCOM disabled Palau-flagged tanker in Gulf of Oman; F/A-18 fired into engine room; 3 Indian crew missing, 21 rescued; India summoned US diplomat; IMO condemned
Mutual Halt Collapse — Day 2 halt completely breaks down; tit-for-tat US-Iran strikes; Apache downing → US strikes → Iran retaliation cycle
MoU Negotiations Collapse — 48 hours: 'disappointing' → 'negotiate with bombs' → 'bomb the S out of them'; MoU framework appears dead; military track replaces diplomatic track
